stemHtml: An aircraft is equipped with PBN capabilities of RNP10, RNAV5, basic RNP1 and RNP APCH. What should be filled in the Item 10 and Item 18 of the ICAO Flight Plan in accordance with ICAO Doc 4444?

options.a: Item 10:R; Item 18: A1, B1, B2, B3, O1, S1
options.b: Item 10:PBN; Item 18: A1, B1, B2, B3, O1, S1
options.c: Item 10:R; Item 18: PBN/A1 B1 B2 B3 O1 S1
options.d: Item 10:R; Item 18: PBN/A1 B1 B2 B3 O1 S2
